sentences.target: Je fais le ménage ce matin.

translations.fr: Je fais le ménage ce matin.
translations.en: I'm doing the housework this morning.
translations.de: Ich mache heute Morgen den Haushalt.
translations.pt: Hoje de manhã eu faço a faxina.
translations.he: אני עושה את עבודות הבית הבוקר.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi làm việc nhà.
translations.ar: أنا أقوم بالأعمال المنزلية هذا الصباح.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मैं घर का काम कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί κάνω τις δουλειές του σπιτιού.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig gjør jeg husarbeid.
translations.id: Pagi ini saya mengerjakan pekerjaan rumah tangga.
translations.sv: Jag städar i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: În dimineața asta fac treburile casnice.
translations.da: Her til morgen gør jeg rent.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular); agrees with the verb 'fais'.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular) of 'faire'; takes 'le ménage' as direct object.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the object noun 'ménage'; part of the idiom 'faire le ménage'.
Common noun (masculine singular) meaning housework/cleaning; direct object of 'fais'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'matin' to form the temporal NP 'ce matin'.
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the temporal NP 'ce matin' functioning as an adverbial time complement.

sentences.target: On doit finir le ménage avant midi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa finiʁ lə menaʒ avɑ̃ midi/

translations.fr: On doit finir le ménage avant midi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa finiʁ lə menaʒ avɑ̃ midi/
translations.en: We have to finish the housework before noon.
translations.es: Tenemos que terminar la limpieza antes del mediodía.
translations.de: Wir müssen den Haushalt bis Mittag fertig machen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo finire le pulizie prima di mezzogiorno.
translations.ko: 우리는 정오 전에 청소를 끝내야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们必须在中午之前把家务做完。
translations.yue: 我哋要喺中午之前做完家務。
translations.ru: Нам нужно закончить уборку до полудня.
translations.pt: Temos que terminar a faxina antes do meio-dia.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לסיים את עבודות הבית לפני הצהריים.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải hoàn thành việc nhà trước trưa.
translations.ar: علينا إنهاء الأعمال المنزلية قبل الظهر.
translations.nl: We moeten het huishouden voor de middag afmaken.
translations.uk: Ми повинні закінчити прибирання до полудня.
translations.hu: Dél előtt be kell fejeznünk a házimunkát.
translations.hi: हमें दोपहर से पहले घर का काम पूरा करना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να τελειώσουμε τις δουλειές του σπιτιού πριν το μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Vi må bli ferdige med husarbeidet før klokka tolv.
translations.id: Kita harus menyelesaikan pekerjaan rumah tangga sebelum tengah hari.
translations.sv: Vi måste bli klara med städningen före klockan tolv.
translations.ro: Trebuie să terminăm treburile casnice înainte de prânz.
translations.da: Vi skal være færdige med rengøringen før klokken tolv.
translations.fi: Meidän täytyy saada siivous valmiiksi ennen puolta päivää.
translations.ja: 正午までに家事を終わらせなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; verb agrees in 3rd person singular.
Verb 'devoir', present indicative (3rd person singular); modal of obligation selecting the infinitive 'finir'.
Infinitive verb complement (xcomp) of 'doit'; takes 'le ménage' as its direct object.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the object noun 'ménage'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'finir'.
Preposition introducing the temporal prepositional phrase 'avant midi'.
Common noun (masculine); complement of the preposition 'avant' specifying the deadline in time.

sentences.target: Vous faites le ménage chaque samedi.

translations.fr: Vous faites le ménage chaque samedi.
translations.en: You do the housework every Saturday.
translations.es: Ustedes hacen la limpieza todos los sábados.
translations.de: Ihr macht jeden Samstag den Haushalt.
translations.it: Fate le faccende domestiche ogni sabato.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们每个星期六做家务。
translations.yue: 你哋每個星期六做家務。
translations.pt: Vocês fazem a faxina todo sábado.
translations.he: אתם עושים עבודות הבית בכל שבת.
translations.vi: Các bạn làm việc nhà mỗi thứ Bảy.
translations.ar: أنتم تقومون بالأعمال المنزلية كل يوم سبت.
translations.nl: Jullie doen elke zaterdag het huishouden.
translations.hi: आप हर शनिवार घर का काम करते हैं.
translations.el: Κάνετε τις δουλειές του σπιτιού κάθε Σάββατο.
translations.id: Kalian mengerjakan pekerjaan rumah tangga setiap hari Sabtu.
translations.ro: Faceți treburile casnice în fiecare sâmbătă.
translations.ja: 毎週土曜日に家事をします。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person plural or formal singular); agrees with 'faites'.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person plural) of 'faire'; takes 'le ménage' as its direct object.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the object noun 'ménage'; idiomatic with 'faire'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'faites'.
Distributive determiner modifying 'samedi' to express habitual frequency.
Common noun; head of the temporal NP 'chaque samedi' functioning as an adverbial time adjunct.

sentences.target: Le ménage m'attend après le dîner.

translations.fr: Le ménage m'attend après le dîner.
translations.en: The housework is waiting for me after dinner.
translations.es: La limpieza me espera después de la cena.
translations.de: Die Hausarbeit wartet nach dem Abendessen auf mich.
translations.it: Le pulizie mi aspettano dopo cena.
translations.ko: 저녁 먹고 나면 집안일이 나를 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 晚饭后还有家务等着我。
translations.yue: 食完晚飯之後仲有家務等我。
translations.pt: A faxina me espera depois do jantar.
translations.he: עבודות הבית מחכות לי אחרי ארוחת הערב.
translations.tr: Akşam yemeğinden sonra beni ev işleri bekliyor.
translations.vi: Sau bữa tối còn việc nhà đang đợi tôi.
translations.nl: Het huishouden wacht op mij na het avondeten.
translations.uk: Після вечері на мене чекає прибирання.
translations.hu: Vacsora után vár rám a házimunka.
translations.hi: रात के खाने के बाद घर का काम मेरा इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Po kolacji czeka na mnie sprzątanie.
translations.el: Οι δουλειές του σπιτιού με περιμένουν μετά το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Husarbeidet venter på meg etter middag.
translations.id: Pekerjaan rumah tangga menunggu saya setelah makan malam.
translations.sv: Städningen väntar på mig efter middagen.
translations.ro: Treburile casnice mă așteaptă după cină.
translations.cs: Po večeři na mě čeká úklid.
translations.da: Husarbejdet venter på mig efter aftensmaden.
translations.ja: 夕食の後は家事が待っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the subject noun 'ménage'.
Common noun (masculine singular); grammatical subject of the verb 'm'attend'.
Verb 'attendre', present indicative (3rd person singular), with attached clitic object pronoun 'm'' (me, 1st person singular); predicate of the clause.
Preposition introducing the temporal PP 'après le dîner'.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'dîner'.
Common noun; complement of 'après', specifying the reference time.
